title: TC Config
description: Project-specific configuration for TC tracking. Created by /tc init.

tc_root.description: Path to TC directory relative to project root

created.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when TC tracking was initialized

skills_library_path.description: Absolute path to the skills_library/TC directory

auto_track.description: When true, Claude will prompt for TC tracking on untracked code changes

auto_regenerate_html.description: When true, regenerate tc_record.html after every TC update

auto_regenerate_dashboard.description: When true, regenerate index.html after TC creation/status changes

default_author.description: Default author name for AI-created entries
